children.name: mj-text
children.text_content: Built for the coldest days in the highest places, Eiger Extreme Nordwand 6.0's down products are part of a complete layering system, fine-tuned to manage heat and moisture between layers. Developed with athletes and rigourously tested – even 1% improvements can make a huge difference.

children.name: mj-text
children.text_content: A LAYERING SYSTEM FOR LIFE IN THE EXTREMES

children.name: mj-text
children.text_content: This is not just a new collection, it's a system. Outer layers shield you from adverse weather and release excess heat, whilst base and midlayers wick moisture and stabilize warmth, so you can custom-create the perfect set-up for you.

children.text_content: The holiday season is around the corner! Find the perfect present for the thrill seeker, powder chaser, or mountain explorer in your life with our gift guide.
